summary: Weekday filter using calendar-derived field; no leakage or integrity issues — purely a regime gate with low deployment risk.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: `weekday` is deterministic from event timestamp (T0 itself); no post-T0 fields, no forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* references. Calendar features cannot leak.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: As a filter (not entry), it only narrows when other archetypes fire; cannot create opposite-side trades against the live `BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long` strategy. If anything, excluding weekends would reduce overlap with live trading windows.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required. Suggest pairing with a binary `is_weekend` variant to reduce the 5-value dimensionality and keep multi-test footprint minimal; also confirm `weekday` is computed from event UTC timestamp (not ingestion time) in the supported-fields layer.
